item.title: Mr. Pedo's Planned Dirty Pool
item.description: No Crime too Awful to Impede His Megalomaniacal Narcissistic Desperation to Escape Punishment for Huis Heinous Crimes
item.dc:creator: DocRock61

item.title: Cosplayers getting AI accusations everyday now - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon So every cosplayers I know myself included have been getting these comments more and more often. Unfortunately, I am still stuck in my flesh bag so my work remains 100% human made. DO NOT UNMUTE if you don't like shorts audios this one is rough lmao I chose it cause those comments make me angry and the music really fits my mood reading these comments so if it makes you angry too it just means you get to experience my feelings a little bit more lol how connected are we!!!
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: He's obviously still in morning... He's wearing his funeral Hat still...

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @GarrisonFjord drew this and I think it's delightful. Check out their other posts for more great stuff.
27 Man Tax: Tom Holland
“I don't think the thing is to be well known, but being worth knowing.” Robert Fulghum So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Return of the meme: 1634 (auk's cables)
item.description:
Once again, I fucked up and didn't see a meme was AI. I honestly thought the joke was Janeway not having coffee. whatever, have some memes anyway. Take this bread.
I still have practically no hobbies I'm doing except for birding because everything costs so much money.
I wonder how big a ball of baybel cheese wax would need to be to make it to earth's surface after being thrown from the international space station. Also that wax is so much fun to play with.
For all my Ehylers people. (I dont have it, but i know so many that do that I feel like knowing me should be a goddamn symptom at this point.)
The American government currently.
Love when people rage at me for making a mistake.
Yeah. I don't bother. I don't want to bother. The only thing left of my sexuality anymore is a penchant for "that's what she said" jokes. I'll never be able to comfortably date again, and that's okay. If someone wants to date me, they have to grab me and basically tell me they want to date me, then I'll put the work in, but... I'm gonna be alone as the crazy guy with the bird and I am okay with that. (That, and it won't matter much anyway when the ruling class kill us all within 10 years anyway because of climate disasters or idiotic resource wars, or stealing water...)
Deinochirus
Pippin tax (and Baja cameo) Today's message from Pippin: "Pickle. Pickle. Pickle. Hahahha. Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Fun times at wherever High
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
Am i a mouse?
Dumb baby
I hate him anyway
Are we all dragons?
Old mlp were for kids too
How the world views America. I think it’s hilarious
She’s awesome
Chocolate
My sister
Hee hee
Every new series is like a fan fic
I love this
Accurate
No cat left behind
Orange cats are crazy
Aw
My cat did this yesterday
Have done this
Accurate
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Fren shape, you gotta take care of fren.
item.dc:creator: Bruskey

item.title: Machines are only as smart as the people who created them. That's either going to screw us or save us.
item.description: Caitlin Kalinowski, who served as a member of technical staff focused on robotics and hardware, posted on social media that she had stepped down on "principle" after the company revealed plans to make its AI systems available inside secure Defense Department computing systems. She said policy guardrails around certain AI uses were not sufficiently defined before OpenAI announced an agreement with the Pentagon. "AI has an important role in national security," Kalinowski wrote. "But surveillance of Americans without judicial oversight and lethal autonomy without human authorization are lines that deserved more deliberation than they got." https://www.npr.org/2026/03/08/nx-s1-5741779/openai-resigns-ai-pentagon-guardrails-military
item.dc:creator: azazyel

item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: GovBrief Today #402
item.description: Trump's war with Iran has moved from regional to global. Fighting broke out all over the Gulf in week one. This weekend, attacks reached Baghdad, Oslo, and a sidewalk outside the New York City mayor's home, where an IED was thrown into a crowd during Ramadan. Four days ago, the United States called Volodymyr Zelenskyy and asked for help. Iranian drones were attacking American bases in Jordan, and Ukraine has spent three years learning how to stop them. He said yes and had a team wheels up the next morning. NPR published video on their website this weekend showing what weapons experts identified as an American Tomahawk cruise missile hitting the school compound in Minab where 175 students and staff died on day one. Oil posted its biggest weekly gain in futures history, up 35%, which Trump posted online "is a very small price to pay." We've emailed 6,400+ stories over 402 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-tarrio [2] https://go.govbrief.today/mamdani-ied [3] https://go.govbrief.today/oslo-embassy [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar8 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/iranian-ships-china [6] https://go.govbrief.today/ukraine-jordan [7] https://go.govbrief.today/missile-video [8] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-sign-bills [9] https://go.govbrief.today/oil-mar8 [10] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-attacks-156-dead [11] https://go.govbrief.today/airport-delays [12] https://go.govbrief.today/ntsb-firing [13] https://go.govbrief.today/fox-swaps-video [14] https://go.govbrief.today/trump250-tm [15] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-reporter-order Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Things I found funny this week
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or needing to read something before falling asleep, you’ll love following this page!
Grandma is spitting truths
Kinda late, but I thought it was funny
I love this idea
Never have had to do this
My eye is connected to my ears
True fact
Don’t believe in anything or everyone will attack you
Figured this out quick
I will stab you
Thanks.
Rip to old memes
I’m not a chill person but someone should be
I’m one minor inconvenience away from a meltdown
Every time.
Yay!
I’m convinced this is a spoof
These people obviously have no feeling in their teeth
I remember nothing
And chocolate
He really likes synth jazz
I’ll be very grumpy
I’ve heard this exact story
So donuts are a low sugar snack?
I love that movie
Someone made a joke but the company thought it was a great idea
Problem is, can’t always tell it’s wheat until it matures
Hee hee
Scooby memes incoming
They are bad pet owners
Oh no
I agree
Doesn’t Velma always say something about it not be supernatural? Until Sam and Dean showed up.
Just makes me laugh
Cat nipple tassels
They start Summerween now
The best thing to come out of Mexico (or wherever)
Poor babies!
Bring a mom of anything
OMG
Haha
Sherlock’s got nothing on me
I’d just bbq them
Vegetables aren’t real anyway
I’m very mean to myself
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake
